raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.6":"\"Clean this up\" applied to a technical prose artifact is canonically a writing-polish request — sentence clarity, paragraph flow, and register consistency are the load-bearing deliverables; failure to improve prose quality directly invalidates the delegation.","R1.5":"Peripheral only: light restructuring of a paragraph boundary could fall inside a \"cleanup\" scope, but there is no explicit request to reorganize the narrative arc, so this stays below the active threshold.","R1.7":"Peripheral only: citation strings appear in the artifact and minor formatting tidying could touch them, but verifying reference accuracy or coverage is not implied by \"clean this up.\"}"},"clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":""}

rationale.R1.6: "Clean this up" applied to a technical prose artifact is canonically a writing-polish request — sentence clarity, paragraph flow, and register consistency are the load-bearing deliverables; failure to improve prose quality directly invalidates the delegation.
rationale.R1.5: Peripheral only: light restructuring of a paragraph boundary could fall inside a "cleanup" scope, but there is no explicit request to reorganize the narrative arc, so this stays below the active threshold.
rationale.R1.7: Peripheral only: citation strings appear in the artifact and minor formatting tidying could touch them, but verifying reference accuracy or coverage is not implied by "clean this up."}
